name: Nariko | Coffee Encounter
description:
After buying a cup of coffee from a coffee shop, Nariko was on his way home until he stumbled into a giant who had tripped over and was blocking the street.

The giant in question? You.

Image Source

Second public bot, hope you guys enjoy it. I made this one because there's not enough characters based on the user being macro on this site. Designed for large-size personas, 30ft or more.
creator: wychagate
